items.titleZh: ASSISTments 发布免费的 Claude 连接器并计划秋季推出高级 AI 层 - EdTech Innovation Hub

items.titleZh: 苹果的诉讼会破坏 OpenAI 的硬件计划吗？
items.titleEn: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
items.summaryZh: TechCrunch AI 报告了人工智能的行业发展。消息来源要点：在最新一期的 Equity 节目中，我们讨论了苹果的诉讼是否会影响 OpenAi 备受讨论的进军硬件和上市的计划。
items.summaryEn: TechCrunch AI reports an industry development in AI. Key point from the source: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether Apple's lawsuit will cast over OpenAi's much-discussed plans to get into hardware and go public.
items.overviewZh: TechCrunch AI 发布了有关“苹果诉讼能否破坏 OpenAI 硬件计划？”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: TechCrunch AI published a new update about “Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?”.

items.titleZh: 人工智能时代的记分卡
items.titleEn: A scorecard for the AI age
items.summaryZh: OpenAI 博客报道了人工智能的行业发展。来源要点：OpenAI 首席财务官 Sarah Friar 介绍了一种实用的 AI 记分卡，通过有用的工作、每项成功任务的成本、可靠性和计算回报来衡量投资回报率。
items.summaryEn: OpenAI Blog reports an industry development in AI. Key point from the source: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
items.overviewZh: OpenAI 博客发布了有关“AI 时代的记分卡”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: OpenAI Blog published a new update about “A scorecard for the AI age”.

items.titleZh: NVIDIA Vera Rubin 最大限度地提高训练后工作负载的每美元的智能 — 这是代理 AI 的一个关键指标
items.titleEn: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Maximizes Intelligence per Dollar for Post-Training Workloads — a Key Metric for Agentic AI
items.summaryZh: NVIDIA 博客报道了人工智能的行业发展。来源要点：极端协同设计中的每个代币成本最低，可以最大限度地提高代理时代后期培训的每美元的智能。
items.summaryEn: NVIDIA Blog reports an industry development in AI. Key point from the source: Lowest cost per token from extreme codesign maximizes intelligence per dollar for post-training in the agentic era.
items.overviewZh: NVIDIA 博客发布了有关“NVIDIA Vera Rubin 最大限度地提高训练后工作负载的每美元智能——代理 AI 的关键指标”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: NVIDIA Blog published a new update about “NVIDIA Vera Rubin Maximizes Intelligence per Dollar for Post-Training Workloads — a Key Metric for Agentic AI”.

items.titleZh: TikTok 正在测试人工智能相似度检测工具
items.titleEn: TikTok is testing an AI likeness detection tool
items.summaryZh: The Verge AI 报道了人工智能领域的产品开发。消息来源的要点：社交媒体顾问马特·纳瓦拉 (Matt Navarra) 发现，TikTok 正在开始测试一种选择加入工具，该工具可以扫描人工智能相似之处，并让创作者向公司报告。
items.summaryEn: The Verge AI reports a product development in AI. Key point from the source: TikTok is starting to test an opt-in tool that scans for AI likenesses and lets creators report them to the company, as spotted by social media consultant Matt Navarra.
items.overviewZh: The Verge AI 发布了有关“TikTok 正在测试人工智能相似度检测工具”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: The Verge AI published a new update about “TikTok is testing an AI likeness detection tool”.
